nodes.title: Prompt Text
widgets_values: Sienna_v1, (tattoo on arm), Young woman with curly red hair and glasses, curvy with full hips and warm, luminous skin. She sits alone at a small café table by the window, late morning light filtering across her. She wears oversized sunglasses that conceal her eyes, a blank loose silk or cotton blouse casually tucked into high-waisted jeans. The blank blouse falls softly at the waist, fabric catching gentle highlights. Her hair is slightly undone, waves relaxed and imperfect, as if styled earlier but lived in since. She stirs her coffee slowly. A ceramic cup rests on the saucer before her, steam rising faintly. Her posture is composed and grounded, shoulders relaxed, chin neutral. There is a subtle glow to her skin, warmth lingering in her cheeks, but nothing in her expression explains it. The café background blurs into soft urban motion, conversation and clinking china implied. Photorealistic, 50mm lens, shallow depth of field, natural daylight colour grading, high-resolution skin and textile detail, soft window light, controlled highlight bloom on glass and ceramic, subtle film grain, contemporary lifestyle editorial realism.
